node.description:
__Height:__ 185 cm (6'1")
__Hobbies:__ Hina Dolls

Wakana Gojou is a fifteen-year-old high-schooler who is not very social, and doesn't fit in well with his fellow classmates, leading to him having no friends at the start of the story. Gojou has a strong appreciation for hina dolls and loves making them, although he is not as skilled as he wants to be. This changes when Gojou ends up meeting someone who doesn't find his love for doll making weird, and instead is amazed at his artistic ability and craftsmanship.

__Height:__ 164 cm (5'3")

Marin is an extravagant, messy, and while quite mature, she's also clumsy. She isn't very skilled at handiwork. Marin is a cosplayer and a huge otaku, being a fan of magical girl anime and adult video games. 
She is very kind, friendly, cheerful and outgoing. She loves eating but still despite that she manages to maintain her slender figure.

~!Marin realizes she is in love with [Wakana](https://anilist.co/character/133678), and throughout the series, continually does whatever she can to invite him to places and spend time with him.!~
Miori is the cousin of [Wakana Gojou](https://anilist.co/character/133678/Wakana-Gojou). She supports him on his seemingly bizarre behavior (buying stockings).

A famous cosplayer that [Marin Kitagawa](https://anilist.co/character/133676) looks up to. 

Her younger sister is [Shinju](https://anilist.co/character/207937/Shinju-Inui).
The main heroine of fictional anime Flower Princess Retsu!!

[Wakana](https://anilist.co/character/133678) was a childhood friend of hers, but when she discovered that Wakana, a man, was obsessed with hina dolls, she called him "disgusting" and ended their relationship.
Shion is the main character from the in-story anime 'Flower Princess Blaze'. Sajuna wants Gojou to make a cosplay outfit based on this characters' 'Black Lily' form.
Suzuka is a photographer who often attends cosplay events. She gets overly excited by a variety of cosplay. She gets especially excited by cross-playing.
Shion's sister and main enemy from the in-story anime 'Flower Princess Blaze'.

Kensei Morita is a member of class 1-5 who is a friend and classmate of [Marin Kitagawa](https://anilist.co/character/133676/Marin-Kitagawa) and later [Wakana Gojou](https://anilist.co/character/133678/Wakana-Gojou).
A character from the manga "I'm a Mega-Best-Selling High-School-Student Light Novel Author That Has a Succubus Thirsting for Me Every Night and I Don't Know What to Do."

This character page is set to represent and list all narrators, which haven't been given a visual representation of themselves in their respective work. 

Please add other narrator characters, which were given a visual representation of themselves, separately from this narrator page.
